posts.text:
There is no legal reason for the DOJ to withhold the rest of the Epstein files from Congress. Our subpoena requires a FULL release.

Pam Bondi needs to end this White House cover-up and release all the files, now.

Video

Great watching the Winter Paralympics and meeting some outstanding advocates for the disabled community last week. Thanks to the City of Long Beach for hosting this great community event.

Video

The changing statements from Epstein’s estate are extremely concerning.

The American public deserves a CLEAR answer as to whether payments were made to a survivor accusing President Trump of serious abuse.

Video

It is important that our Committee conducts a serious and thorough investigation in the Epstein case.

I look forward to speaking with Tova Noel, who was the last person to see Jeffrey Epstein alive. We have lots of questions.

Video

Trump’s weaponization of the DOJ is dangerous, and blocking his attacks against Jerome Powell was the right thing to do.

The Fed must remain an independent agency, as it has always been.

Video

Antisemitic attacks are on the rise, and the recent assault on Temple Israel in Michigan is horrifying.

Violence against places of worship and against our communities must end. Grateful that local law enforcement here at home is stepping up patrols.

This is a cover-up that goes all the way to the top of government.

Soon, Pam Bondi will have to explain why half of the Epstein files have yet to be released and why she continues to delay justice for survivors.

Video
RT @jkbjournalist: NEW: House Oversight Committee wants to interview Epstein prison guard who worked the night Epstein died.  Interview req…

This is Annie Farmer, a survivor of Jeffrey Epstein's horrific abuse.

We are fighting for her, her sister Maria, and so many others every single day. And we won't stop until we get justice.

Video

Oversight Democrats are keeping the pressure on the DOJ and Epstein's estate until they release all the files in their possession.

Our investigation is far from over. We have a ton of important testimonies coming up, including today's deposition of Epstein's personal accountant.

Video

As a former mayor, I know how important city investments are. Proud to present the City of Long Beach with $3.7 million for local community projects. These funds are going to support youth, public safety, and better streets.

➡️ $1,031,000 for a new city DNA lab, which will modernize services and bring justice to victims faster
➡️ $850,000 for Marina Vista Park to enhance open space
➡️ $850,000 for murals, street furniture, landscaping and other improvements on the Broadway corridor
➡️ $750,000
We just filed for re-election to Congress!
Abolish ICE. #congressman #democrats #dems #abolishice
It’s a White House Cover-Up. #democrats #congressman #dems #oversightcommittee #releasethefiles
ICE is terrorizing LA. All people have a right to due process. #democrats #congressman #dems
NO MORE OIL DRILLING off our coast. #democrats #congressman #dems
We won’t stop until we RELEASE the Epstein files! #democrats #congressman
Time to stop this Epstein cover-up.
Release the Epstein Files, NOW. #democrats #congressman #dems
Let’s fucking go.
Let’s stop Trump and Vote!
